title: pentanema glanduligerum
intro: Pentanema glanduligerum, also known as woolly knapweed, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Pentanema glanduligerum can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, allowing for a range of applications in natural remedies.
